title: MCP Gateway — Command Catalog (v1)
description: Array of slash-command templates surfaced in .claude/commands/<server>.md when the matching server is running. Cross-references to servers.json are enforced by scripts/check-catalog-refs.js, not by this schema (JSON Schema cannot express cross-document refs cleanly). $id is documentation only; the extension never resolves it over the network.

server_name.description: Must match a server.name in servers.json. Cross-referenced by check-catalog-refs.js.

command_name.description: Slash command suffix. Final command emitted as /<server_name>-<command_name>.

template_md.description: Markdown template body. Allow-list variables ${server_name} and ${server_url} are substituted at write time; unknown ${var} tokens are left literal.

required_vars.description: Documentation only — names of variables the operator must supply when invoking the command.

suggested_vars.description: Documentation only — optional variables the operator may supply.
